id.description: Unique identifier for the mod (e.g. ExampleMod). Must match "[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*"

version.description: Mod version string (semantic or engine style, e.g. 5.2.1f).

display_name.description: Human-readable mod name shown in UI (max 50 characters).

description_long.description: Long description shown when mod details are openned; no strict limit.

authors.description: Author name or array of author names.

primary_dlls.description:
List of primary DLL file names included with the mod.
DLLs must be always sorted from independent to dependent one.

mod_dependencies.description:
List of required mod IDs (strings).
Mod ID of the dependency with optional version defined as >= after ID (e.g. ModDep or ModDep>=1.0.0f).

optional_mod_dependencies.description:
List of optional mod IDs (strings).
Mod ID of the dependency with optional version defined as >= after ID (e.g. ModDep or ModDep>=1.0.0f).

non_locking_dll_load.description:
If true, DLLs are loaded in a non-locking manner.
 When is set to false, the mod cannot be updated until the game (or Unity Engine) is closed.

can_add_to_saved_game.description: If true, the mod can be added to an existing saved game.

can_remove_from_saved_game.description: If true, the mod can be removed from an existing saved game.

primary_mod_class_name.description: Name of class loaded from .dlls when multiple of IMod implementations are loaded. This may happen when a dependency mod is attached.
